Class Win32InteropMarker

Namespace
FluentGpu.Win32.Interop
Assembly
FluentGpu.Win32.Interop.dll

SCAFFOLD. Owner of the hand-vtable COM layer (see design/subsystems/com-interop.md): vendored ComputeSharp ComPtr<T> + ClangSharp-generated D3D12/DXGI/D2D1 bindings, and the generated DComp/DWrite/UIA vtables (consume = lpVtbl[n] calli; implement = static [UnmanagedCallersOnly(CallConvMemberFunction)] + GCHandle). Empty until the Windows leaves are implemented; the headless slice does not need it.

public static class Win32InteropMarker

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
